---
title: 'Ezekial 38-39 End Times Battle...'
date: '2010-08-31T14:06:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8922888644979321279'
blogger_filename: '/2010/08/ezekial-38-39-end-times-battle.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Turkey, Iran, Sudan, and Libya among others are the end time players in this all out 360 degree attack against Israel. It's interesting to look at the map on this:<br />
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/israel-map-end-times-battle-2bda9691bac9.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="356" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/israel-map-end-times-battle-629bfa649efc.jpg" width="640" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Israel- End Times Battle Line Up</td><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><br />
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
